messages.author: dave_patel
messages.text: Checking. Looks like HTTP 429 rate spiked from near-zero to 38% of all responses. Investigating.

messages.author: jake_wilson
messages.text: I see it too. Could be related to recent deploy.

messages.author: dave_patel
messages.text: Found the issue: The fixed-window counter was applied at the global service level rather than per.... Deploying fix.

messages.author: dave_patel
messages.text: Confirmed resolved. Writing up incident report.
